{{nihongo|'''Yatano Shrine'''|矢田神社}} is a [[shinto shrine]] in the [[Engishiki Jinmyōchō]]. It is located in [[Tango Province]].

{{nihongo|'''Yatano Shrine'''|矢田神社}} is a [[shinto shrine]] in the [[Engishiki Jinmyōchō]]. It is located in [[Tango Province]].

{{nihongo|'''Yatano Shrine'''|矢田神社}} is a [[shinto shrine]] in the [[Engishiki Jinmyōchō]]. It is located in [[Tango Province]].

== instance of (P31) ==

{{nihongo|'''Yatano Shrine'''|矢田神社}} is a [[shinto shrine]] in the [[Engishiki Jinmyōchō]]. It is located in [[Tango Province]].
